creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
lang/gcc42 (PORTVERSION=4.2.3, PORTREVISION=20080102) WITH_JAVA_AWT=yes fails to install (e.g. make install) while builds itself without errors (at least detected by the port "make"), here's what the installation produces:

gmake[5]: Вхожу у каталог "/usr/ports/lang/gcc42/work/build/i386-portbld-freebsd
7.0/libjava/classpath/native/jawt"
gmake[6]: Вхожу у каталог "/usr/ports/lang/gcc42/work/build/i386-portbld-freebsd
7.0/libjava/classpath/native/jawt"

3"

jawt.la' '/usr/local/lib/gcc-4.2.3/gcj-4.2.3/libjawt.la'
